PowerShell($env:HF_HOME; $env:TRANSFORMERS_CACHE; $env:HUGGINGFACE_HUB_CACHE; Write-Output "---"; Get-PSDrive -PSProvider FileSystem | Format-Table Name, @{N='Used_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,1\)}}, @{N='Free_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}} -AutoSize)

PowerShell(if \(Test-Path D:\\ssd_video_data\) { Get-ChildItem D:\\ssd_video_data -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 20 FullName, @{N='SizeMB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1MB,1\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize }; Write-Output "---"; Get-PSDrive D | Format-Table Name, @{N='Used_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='Free_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}})

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\swsuser-j07\\.cache\\huggingface\\hub\\models--Qwen--Qwen3-VL-8B-Instruct" -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { -not $_.PSIsContainer } | Measure-Object Length -Sum | ForEach-Object { Write-Output "Total: $\([math]::Round\($_.Sum/1GB,2\)\) GB across $\($_.Count\) files" })

PowerShell(Get-PSDrive D | Format-Table Name, @{N='Used_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Used/1GB,2\)}}, @{N='Free_GB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Free/1GB,1\)}}; Write-Output "---"; Get-ChildItem D:\\ssd_video_data\\ovo_src_parts -File -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Name, @{N='SizeGB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1GB,2\)}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)
